The lane keeping system on the Lincoln Navigator L is very heavily “right handed”and hugs the right line while cruise control is active. The lane centering over corrects and bounces off of the center line and right hand side lanes on two lane highways.   This caused me to strike

narrative.headline: What 2024 Lincoln Navigator owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 15 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Suspension (33% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
